MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Every <hello@every.to>
To: '' <emil@skogsund.se>
Date: Wed, 18 Feb 2026 15:05:10 +0000
Subject: Vibe Check: Anthropic Just Made Opus Cheaper Without Calling It That
Message-ID: <20260218150510.83b317a879517846@mg.every.to>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html>
<!-- Set the language of your main document. This helps screenreaders use the proper language profile, pronunciation, and accent. --><html lang="en">
  <head>
    <!-- The title is useful for screenreaders reading a document. Use your sender name or subject line. -->
    <title>Vibe Check: Anthropic Just Made Opus Cheaper Without Calling It That </title>
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
    <!-- Never disable zoom behavior! Fine to set the initial width and scale, but allow users to set their own zoom preferences. -->
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <style>
      .article{background-color:#fff;color:#2b2b2b;font-family:"Signifier","Palatino","Georgia","Times New Roman",serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:400;line-height:28px;margin:0 0px;min-height:22px;line-height:1;background:#efedea;color:#166e82;border-radius:4px;font-family:"Geist Mono","SFMono-Regular","Menlo","Consolas","Liberation Mono","Courier span.text{display:inline}.quill-tweet{display:block;max-width:520px;margin:1em auto;border:1px solid #e1e8ed;border-radius:5px;line-height:1em;padding:20px 20px 13px 20px}.quill-tweet *{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,Ubuntu,"Helvetica Neue",sans-serif}.quill-tweet>span{display:inline-block;width:100%}.quill-tweet a{text-decoration:none !important;font-size:16px;color:#111}.quill-tweet a .tweet-header{margin-bottom:14px}.quill-tweet a .tweet-header img{float:left;display:block;margin:0 8px 0 0 !important;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%}.quill-tweet a .tweet-header .tweet-author-name{display:block;margin-bottom:0;color:#1c2022;font-weight:700;line-height:16px}.quill-tweet a .tweet-header .tweet-author{display:block;color:#697882;font-size:14px;line-height:14px}.quill-tweet a .reply-tweet{font-size:14px;color:#697882;margin-bottom:10px}.quill-tweet a .reply-tweet #e1e8ed;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer}.quill-tweet a .tweet-gif-preview span{position:absolute;margin-top:-32px;margin-left:9px;height:22px;padding:5px;background:rgba(55,55,55,.9);color:#fff;border-radius:3px;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;line-height:12px}.quill-tweet a .tweet-video-preview{position:relative}.quill-tweet a .tweet-video-preview .play{position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;margin:auto;width:64px;height:64px}.quill-tweet a .tweet-poll       .ea-block.normal{background-color:#f1f1f1;border-radius:5px;margin:70px 0px;padding:10px;font-family:"Signifier","Palatino","Georgia","Times New Roman",serif}.ea-block.normal:first-of-type{margin-top:0px}.ea-block.normal:last-child{margin-bottom:0px}.ea-block.normal h4.ea-block-label{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol";text-transform:uppercase;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:#8c8d91;text-align:center;margin:0px}.ea-block.normal .ea-block-inner{font-size:16px;padding:10px}.ea-block.normal .ea-block-inner p{margin-bottom:20px}.ea-block.normal .ea-block-inner p a{color:#2b2b2b}.ea-block.normal .ea-block-inner .quill-block-image{text-align:center}.ea-block.normal .ea-block-footer{text-align:center}.ea-block.normal .ea-block-footer a,.ea-block.normal .ea-block-footer span{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol";font-size:14px;color:#8c8d91 !important}.admin-form .advertisement{margin:0px}

    </style>

</head>
  <body background="#fff">
    <!-- Some preview text. -->
      <div class="preview-text" style="display: none; font-size: 1px; color: #333333; line-height: 1px; max-height: 0px; max-width: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden;">
          Sonnet 4.6 delivers Opus-close performance at half the price—but speed didn't come along for the ride
         ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
      </div>

    <table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" width="100%" align="center" role="presentation"><tr><td>
      <div class="article" role="article" aria-label="Vibe Check: Anthropic Just Made Opus Cheaper Without Calling It That " lang="en">

          <!-- Main content section. Main is a useful landmark element. -->
          <main>
            <a class="logo" href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQW50aHJvcGljIEp1c3QgTWFkZSBPcHVzIENoZWFwZXIgV2l0aG91dCBDYWxsaW5nIEl0IFRoYXQgIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6Mzk0NSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjB9">
              <img class="logo-img" width="84" height="24" src="https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/static/every-logo.png">
            </a>
            
<div class="newsletter-email">
  <div class="post-intro">
      <div class="publication-brand">
        <a class="publication-brand-link" href="https://every.">
            <img class="publication-logo" width="50" height="50" src="https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/uploads/publication/logo/101/small_Frame_48095758.png">
            <p class="publication-name">Vibe Check</p>
        </a>
      </div>
    <h1 class="title">
        <a href="https://every.">Vibe Check: Anthropic Just Made <span class="hand hand-O">O</span>pus Cheaper Without Calling It That </a>
    </h1>
      <h2 class="subtitle">
          <a href="https://every.">Sonnet 4.6 delivers Opus-close performance at half the price—but speed didn't come along for the ride</a>
      </h2>
    <div class="post-meta">
        <p class="byline">by <a href="https://every.">Katie Parrott</a></p>
    </div>
      <figure>
        <img class="post-cover" src="https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/uploads/post/cover/3945/full_page_cover_cover_image_sonnet.png" width="600">
          <figcaption>Midjourney/Every illustration.</figcaption>
      </figure>
  </div>

  <div class="post-body">
    <p><em>Was this newsletter forwarded to you?<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Sign up</a></u> to get it in your inbox.</em></p>
<p></p>
<hr class="quill-line">
<p></p>
<p>Historically, <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Sonnet</a></u> has been Opus’s cheaper, faster sibling: You traded some brainpower for speed and cost savings. </p>
<p>Now, with the release of Sonnet 4.6, Anthropic says you don’t have to trade anything—just pay less. If you’re running a live app with users on Opus right now, there is some good news about your API costs: Sonnet 4.6 costs $3 input/$15 output per million tokens—roughly half what Opus runs. (GPT-5.2, for comparison, costs $1.75 input/$14 output per 1 million tokens.) Cost has been a consistent sticking point with Opus, and with Sonnet 4.6, Anthropic seems to be saying, “We hear you.” </p>
<p>These are true day-zero tests—we got access when everyone else did—so let’s dive in to determine in real time whether it’s true that Sonnet’s new capabilities come without sacrifice. You can also <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">watch the livestream</a></u> we did yesterday as soon as the model dropped. </p>
<h2>The Reach Test</h2>
<h5>
<strong>Dan Shipper, cofounder and CEO 🟨</strong> </h5>
<p>“Green for using inside of products you’re building, yellow for my own daily work. If you’re building an app that was previously too expensive to run on Opus, this is a big deal. For coding and complex tasks where I can afford Opus and 5.3 Codex, I’d probably stick with it.”</p>
<h5>
<strong>Kieran Klaassen, general manager of <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQW50aHJvcGljIEp1c3QgTWFkZSBPcHVzIENoZWFwZXIgV2l0aG91dCBDYWxsaW5nIEl0IFRoYXQgIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6Mzk0NSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vY29yYS5jb21wdXRlciIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo5fQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Cora</a></u> 🟨</strong> </h5>
<p>“It’s very usable, and for a lot of people it should be the default. But it frustrated me when it got stuck on something Opus solved in one shot. Anytime a model frustrates me, that’s a no-go for my personal workflow—but this is genuinely solid for production.”</p>
<h2>What works well</h2>
<p>The model is smart. Across coding tasks, pull request triage, brainstorming, and a complex P&amp;L restructuring, it held the thread, followed through on multi-step instructions, and didn’t make the kind of mid-task mistakes that would have tripped up Sonnet 4.5. </p>
<p>Kieran ran it through a full <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">compound engineering</a></u> workflow—sorting through a backlog of pending code changes, merging branches, writing changelogs, and theming issues—and came away impressed. “I’ve not found any reasons to believe it’s not as smart as <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Opus 4.6</a></u>,” he said.</p>
<p>The economics are a big win for teams using Opus inside production AI apps. <strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Spiral</a></u></strong>, Every’s AI ghostwriter, for example, has been running on Opus at up to $1,000 a day in token costs. With Sonnet 4.6, that cost roughly halves, without touching the codebase.</p>
<h2>What needs work</h2>
<p>Given past precedent, you’d expect a new Sonnet model to be meaningfully faster than Opus. This one feels nearly the same. That’s fine if you’re getting Opus-quality output, but disappointing if you were counting on snappier performance for iteration-heavy workflows.</p>
<p>The model also showed some erratic behavior under pressure. When Dan asked it to plan a homepage redesign, it correctly asked for a name for the work tree—a separate copy of the codebase where it could experiment safely—then immediately started rewriting the homepage anyway. As Dan noted, “It’s both too cautious and too eager.” And when Kieran ran into an MCP configuration issue, Sonnet 4.6 spun in circles while Opus solved it in one shot and cited the exact wrong file.</p>
<h2>The verdict</h2>
<p>Dan thinks that Anthropic’s strategy is to keep model tier prices stable while continuously improving the product. Whatever Opus can do today, Sonnet will be able to do it in six months for less.</p>
<p>If you’re building AI-powered products and have been holding off on Opus because of cost, the wait is over. Sonnet 4.6 appears to be the model that delivers the capability you want without making your bank account cry. If you’re using Claude for your own complex work and can swing the Opus price, you probably don’t need to switch yet. But if you’re on the $20 Pro plan and want more horsepower, this is a meaningful upgrade.</p>
<p></p>
<hr class="quill-line">
<p></p>
<p><em>For more on Claude Sonnet, check out our previous coverage:</em> </p>
<ol>
<li data-list="bullet">
<span class="ql-ui" contenteditable="false"></span><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">“Vibe Check: Claude 3.7 Sonnet and Claude Code</a></u>”</li>
<li data-list="bullet">

</ol>
<p></p>
<hr class="quill-line">
<p></p>
<p><strong><em><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Katie Parrott</a></em></strong> <em>is a staff writer and AI editorial lead at Every. You can read more of her work in</em> <em><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">her newsletter</a>.</em></p>
<p><em>To read more essays like this, subscribe to <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Every</a></u>, and follow us on X at <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">@every</a></u> and on <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></u>.</em></p>
<p><em>We <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">build AI tools</a></u> for readers like you. Write brilliantly with <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Spiral</a></u>. Organize files automatically with </em><strong><em><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQW50aHJvcGljIEp1c3QgTWFkZSBPcHVzIENoZWFwZXIgV2l0aG91dCBDYWxsaW5nIEl0IFRoYXQgIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6Mzk0NSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vbWFrZWl0c3BhcmtsZS5jby8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ldmVyeWZvb3RlciIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyNH0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Sparkle</a></u></em></strong><em>. Deliver yourself from email with <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQW50aHJvcGljIEp1c3QgTWFkZSBPcHVzIENoZWFwZXIgV2l0aG91dCBDYWxsaW5nIEl0IFRoYXQgIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6Mzk0NSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vY29yYS5jb21wdXRlci8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MjV9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Cora</a></u>. Dictate effortlessly with </em><strong><em><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQW50aHJvcGljIEp1c3QgTWFkZSBPcHVzIENoZWFwZXIgV2l0aG91dCBDYWxsaW5nIEl0IFRoYXQgIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6Mzk0NSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vbW9ub2xvZ3VlLnRvLyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyNn0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Monologue</a></u></em></strong><em>.</em></p>
<p><em>We also do AI training, adoption, and innovation for companies. <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Work with us</a></u> to bring AI into your organization.</em></p>

      <h3 style="font-family: serif; font-weight: normal; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 5px;">Get More Out Of Your Subscription</h3>

      </a>
    </div>
    
    <!-- 4. Mobile-style content sections -->
    <div style="width: 100%; padding: 15px; background-color: #f8f8f8; border-bottom-left-radius: 10px; border-bottom-right-radius: 10px; box-sizing: border-box;">
      <!-- Front-row access section -->
      <div style="display: table; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 15px;">
        <div style="display: table-cell; width: 33%; vertical-align: top; padding-right: 8px;">
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: start; margin-bottom: 4px;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/pencil.png" alt="Pencil" style="width: 14px; height: 14px; margin-right: 4px;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 600;">Front-row access to the future of AI</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="display: table-cell; width: 67%; vertical-align: top;">
          <div style="margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/check.png" alt="Check" style="width: 12px; height: 12px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: middle;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2;">In-depth reviews of new models on release day</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/check.png" alt="Check" style="width: 12px; height: 12px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: middle;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2;">Playbooks and guides for putting AI to work</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/check.png" alt="Check" style="width: 12px; height: 12px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: middle;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2;">Prompts and use cases for builders</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Divider -->
      <div style="width: 100%; height: 1px; border-top: 1px dashed #dddddd; margin: 10px 0;"></div>
      
      <!-- Bundle of AI software section -->
      <div style="display: table; width: 100%;">
        <div style="display: table-cell; width: 33%; vertical-align: top; padding-right: 8px;">
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: start; margin-bottom: 4px;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/sparks.png" alt="Sparks" style="width: 14px; height: 14px; margin-right: 4px;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">Bundle of AI software</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="display: table-cell; width: 67%; vertical-align: top;">
          <div style="margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/app_icons/sparkle.png" alt="Sparkle" style="width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: middle;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Sparkle:</strong> Organize your Mac with AI</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/app_icons/cora.png" alt="Cora" style="width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: middle;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Cora:</strong> The most human way to do email</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/app_icons/spiral.png" alt="Spiral" style="width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: middle;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Spiral:</strong> Repurpose your content endlessly</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1;">
            <img src="https://every.to/paywall/app_icons/monologue.png" alt="Monologue" style="width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: middle;">
            <span style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Monologue:</strong> Effortless voice dictation for your Mac</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

          <!-- Footer information. Footer is a useful landmark element. -->
          <footer>
              <!-- This link uses descriptive text to inform the user what will happen with the link is tapped. -->
              <!-- It also uses inline styles since some email clients won't render embedded styles from the head. -->
